items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered a broken foot in his last fight against Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: broken foot the last time you fought Dustin Porier

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has won four consecutive fights by finish, all within the first two rounds.
items.quote: He's coming off of four wins. Four wins in a row. All four finishes. None of them getting out of the second round.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis possesses the ability to strike, grapple, and wrestle at a high level.
items.quote: This guy can strike. This guy can grapple. Not just grapple. He can wrestle as well.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis forces opponents into high-pressure situations immediately, similar to Justin Gaethje.
items.quote: it is his ability to put you in danger, under pressure in in he brings you into the fire immediately. Same thing Justin Gatechi does.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett's competitive experience against Justin Gaethje serves as a psychological motivation for his upcoming fight.
items.quote: the fact that Justin Gai just became champion and they had that war between him and Patty Pimlet, bro. It's also an energy booster, a motivation for him.
